_comment: Real Dossier IDs only. 'mailto-contact-form' is required because a professional services firm without a formal enquiry path fails the basic 'serious buyer needs to reach the right partner' test. Sections like 'hero', 'expertise-areas', 'practice-grid', 'partners-grid', 'industries-served' and 'credentials' are declared in sections.json and must not appear here. See ADR 0012 for the Dossier vs Section distinction.

conditional.when: the firm has photographic identity material (office portraits, partner photos, event photography) it wants to lead with
